title: Audit Annotations — authorization.k8s.io/decision
text:
Example:
authorization.k8s.io/decision: "forbid"
Value must be
forbid
or
allow
. This annotation indicates whether or not a request
was authorized in Kubernetes audit logs.
See
Auditing
for more information.

Example:
authorization.k8s.io/reason: "Human-readable reason for the decision"
This annotation gives reason for the
decision
in Kubernetes audit logs.
See
Auditing
for more information.
